name: The Tyrant
description:
Suit Crowns (Cha)

Alignment lawful evil

As long as you have The Tyrant invested, you gain a +2 item bonus to Intimidation checks made to Demoralize. This bonus increases to +3 if you are at least 17th level.

Activate (2 Actions) envision, Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You hold the card up to your lips and exhale onto it; you cast Dragon Form. The rank of the spell is half your level, rounded down (minimum 6th level).
